user_request: What are all the breakfast places

poi_001.description: Enjoy breakfast at one of Toronto's most famous markets, savoring fresh pastries and local produce.

rest_005.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast with Hawaiian coffee and pastries.

stage1.reasoning: St. Lawrence Market is scheduled in the morning and is known for breakfast options; Hula Girl Espresso is explicitly listed in the morning, and as an espresso bar, it could offer breakfast.

stage2.reasoning: Both St. Lawrence Market and Hula Girl Espresso provide breakfast options as described in their details. St. Lawrence Market offers breakfast at a prominent market with pastries and local produce, fitting the request for breakfast places. Similarly, Hula Girl Espresso offers breakfast items and coffee, confirming its relevance as a breakfast place.
